text: As I move through these modern, bright halls and into the vibrant exhibition space marked "R + D," I feel a quiet sense of curiosity awakening within me. The clinical clarity of the corridor contrasts with the creative energy of the display inside. Surrounded by screens and intriguing artifacts, I find myself reflecting on the spirit of human innovation—how we merge art and technology in our endless quest to understand and improve our world. Amid all this activity, I feel both inspired and small, contemplating my place in the ever-unfolding story of learning and discovery.
